agent.command: Run this bash command (it kicks off a recording in the background and prints the PID): nohup bash /Users/hal.hildebrand/git/recording-rig/bin/record.sh /Users/hal.hildebrand/git/recording-rig/test-runs/inner-spec.json > /tmp/inner-spec.out 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo INNER_KICKED_PID=$! && sleep 1 && echo OUTER_DONE
